text:
An application under Section 643.052 (Application) must be filed with the department and accompanied by:

(1) an application fee of $100 plus a $10 fee for each vehicle requiring registration;

(2) evidence of insurance or financial responsibility as required by Section 643.103 (Filing; Evidence of Insurance; Fees) (a); and

(3) any insurance filing fee required under Section 643.103 (Filing; Evidence of Insurance; Fees) (c).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.053 — Filing of Application

An application under Section 643.052 (Application) must be filed with the department and accompanied by:

    (1) an application fee of $100 plus a $10 fee for each vehicle requiring registration;

    (2) evidence of insurance or financial responsibility as required by Section 643.103 (Filing; Evidence of Insurance; Fees) (a); and

    (3) any insurance filing fee required under Section 643.103 (Filing; Evidence of Insurance; Fees) (c).

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1046 (H.B.2094), Sec. 3.08, eff. September 1, 2007.*
